description: Create a TypeScript module 'groupAnagrams.ts' at the repo root exporting a 'groupAnagrams(words: string[]): string[][]' function. It groups input strings such that each inner array contains all anagrams of one another. Comparison is case-sensitive and treats the empty string as its own group. The input array must not be mutated. Tests in tests/groupAnagrams.test.ts must pass.
